'''Stephen Holgate''' (15 December 1971 – 16 November 2021) was an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s. He played at representative level for [[England national rugby league team|England]] and [[Cumbria rugby league team|Cumbria]], and at club level for [[Hensingham ARLFC]] (in [[Hensingham]], [[Whitehaven]]),<ref name="Hensingham ARLFC at pitchero.com">{{cite web|url=https://www.pitchero.com/clubs/hensinghamarlfc|title=Hensingham ARLFC at pitchero.com|publisher=pitchero.com|date=31 December 2017|accessdate=1 January 2018}}</ref> [[Workington Town]], [[Wigan Warriors]], [[Hull F.C.|Hull Sharks]] and [[Halifax R.L.F.C.|Halifax]] in the [[Super League]] as a {{rlp|pr}}, or {{rlp|sr}}.<ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org"/>

Holgate started his career with [[Workington Town]], and played for the club during the inaugural [[Super League]] season in 1996.

Holgate was signed by [[Wigan Warriors|Wigan]] in December 1996 for a fee of £100,000.<ref>{{cite news |title=Holgate joins new cherry and whites |url=https://archive.org/details/Independent1996IrelandEnglish/Dec%2007%201996%2C%20Independent%2C%20%233162%2C%20Ireland%20%28en%29/page/n51/mode/2up?view=theater |work=The Independent |date=7 December 1996 |page=24}}</ref> He played at {{rlp|sr}} for the club in their [[1998 Super League Grand Final]] victory over [[Leeds Rhinos]].<ref>{{cite web |title=Sport: Rugby League  Robinson's run helps Wigan to glory |url=https://news.bbc.co.uk/2/hi/sport/rugby_league/200798.stm |website=BBC News |access-date=22 January 2024 |date=24 October 1998}}</ref>

He died on 16 November 2021, at the age of 49.<ref>{{cite news |last1=de la Riviere |first1=Richard |title=Death of a star Cumbrian |url=https://pocketmags.com/eu/league-express-magazine/3304/articles/1071957/death-of-a-star-cumbrian |access-date=26 November 2021 |publisher=Pocket Mags |date=22 November 2021}}</ref><ref>{{cite news |last1=Ibbetson |first1=Stephen |title=Wigan Grand Final winner Stephen Holgate dies aged 49 |url=https://www.totalrl.com/wigan-grand-final-winner-stephen-holgate-dies-aged-49/ |access-date=26 November 2021 |publisher=Total Rugby League |date=17 November 2021}}</ref>
